name: Saturn Oil & Gas Inc.
summary: Saturn Oil & Gas Inc. engages in the acquisition, exploration, evaluation, and development of energy and resource deposits in Canada. It is involved in the production, exploration, and development of its Viking light oil assets and Success heavy oil assets in West-Central Saskatchewan. The company was formerly known as Saturn Minerals Inc. and changed its name to Saturn Oil & Gas Inc. in January 2017. Saturn Oil & Gas Inc. was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Calgary, Canada.
